# El bug: MAD = 0 con datos "concentrados"

## Dónde está

```python
mad = find_median([abs(x - median) for x in data])
threshold = 3 * mad
filtered = [x for x in data if abs(x - median) <= threshold]
```

```python
    for intento in range(max_retrie
```
